nodes.label: AI's ability to apply domain-specific knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or unhelpful for knowledge and ideas
nodes.grounding_span: brush up on domain knowledge of what I'm working on. It also helps me come up with new ideas

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I like to work through the problem with AI. I don't trust the work AI puts out independently

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Unrestricted AI use without privacy consideration
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks that requires very specific company related knowledge so that information isn't leaked

nodes.label: AI as accountability and follow-up assistant
nodes.grounding_span: If they do make a mistake, I'll be the one taking all the blame

nodes.label: AI first response quality
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes an extra word or two can make the conversation so different for the AI to catch

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human skills or autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer AI to give me the support I need

nodes.label: Innovation and creating new knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: come up with new ideas and approaches to idea I don't think of before

nodes.label: Professional accountability
nodes.grounding_span: I'll be the one taking all the blame

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for bug understanding
nodes.grounding_span: A time that using AI made me feel satisfied is when it find the bug I've been trying to solve for a long time

nodes.label: Distrust of AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust the work AI puts out independently

nodes.label: Concern about privacy with AI
nodes.grounding_span: If privacy isn't a concern, I would prefer AI to give me the support I need

nodes.label: Positive anticipation of AI as adaptive collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: AI will be a tool that'll always be by my side

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth questioning
nodes.grounding_span: I start asking questions from different directions of thinking to pick out information I need

nodes.label: Detailed upfront contextualization
nodes.grounding_span: I provide context based on my task to make sure the AI knows whats going on
